title: raw_nasdaq.json / raw_otherlisted.json
description: Raw NASDAQ FTP data before any filtering. Generated by hugo_generators.py::generate_raw_ftp_data(). The 'data' rows are a direct pass-through of the pipe-delimited FTP files, so exact columns differ between the two files.

columns.description: Column names from the FTP file header. nasdaqlisted.txt: [Symbol, Security Name, Market Category, Test Issue, Financial Status, Round Lot Size, ETF, NextShares]. otherlisted.txt: [ACT Symbol, Security Name, Exchange, CQS Symbol, ETF, Round Lot Size, Test Issue, NASDAQ Symbol].

data.description: One object per row from the FTP file. Keys are the column names from the 'columns' array. Values may be string, number, or null (NaN rows replaced with null).
